data.title: Stock market hits record highs led by Nvidia, Fed news. Palantir, Spotify top new buys. Dow Jones Futures surging.
data.description: The stock market reached all-time highs as major indexes surged, driven by a significant Nvidia agreement and the second-day response from the Federal Reserve. Palantir and Spotify were among the top new purchases in the market. Dow Jones Futures indicated a strong performance, with investors showing optimism following these developments.

data.title: Stock market rallies with Russell 2000 hitting new high; Dow Jones up after jobless claims. Nvidia stock surges on Intel stake.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose along with other indexes following a surprising decrease in weekly jobless claims. Nvidia's stock surged due to its stake in Intel. The Russell 2000 reached a new high in today's stock market, with certain chip stocks also experiencing notable growth. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily in a live coverage report.

data.title: ZEVAS returning to Los Angeles Auto Show with consumers voting on top zero-emission vehicles on October 1.
data.description: The 2025 LA Auto Show is introducing a showcase of zero-emission vehicles, emphasizing the advancement of clean mobility. Consumers will have the opportunity to vote for their top choices in five different awards programs, beginning on October 1. This event is expected to feature a variety of categories, promoting the future of eco-friendly transportation.

data.title: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. reveals election of directors and annual meeting results on September 18, 2025 in Kellogg, Idaho.
data.description: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. disclosed the outcomes of its recent annual stockholders' meeting on September 18, 2025, in Kellogg, Idaho. The gathering saw voting on various agenda items relevant to the company's interests. Bunker Hill, identified by its market codes (TSX-V: BNKR |OTCQB: BHLL), revealed the details without specifying the specifics.

data.title: Argonne captures real-time evolution of metal microstructures during 3D printing in Illinois, showing advancements in research.
data.description: In Lemont, Illinois, a recent study conducted by researchers showcased the real-time evolution of metal microstructure during 3D printing. The study provides valuable insights into the process, with significant implications for the manufacturing sector. The breakthrough findings offer a deeper understanding of metal properties during printing, vital for improving material quality and optimization. This research marks a pivotal moment in the field, shedding light on the intricate details of the 3D printing process.

data.title: Five HGreg dealerships named in Automotive News Canada's 2025 Best Dealerships to Work For list, among 40 nationwide winners.
data.description: HGreg, a company based in Montreal, has recently revealed that five of its dealerships have secured a prestigious spot on the 2025 list of Best Dealerships to Work For in Canada. This accolade, bestowed by Automotive News Canada, is bestowed upon only 40 dealerships across the country. The recognition highlights HGreg's steadfast dedication to fostering a dynamic, employee-focused, and outstanding workplace. The acknowledgment serves as a validation of the hard work and enthusiasm exhibited by the teams at HGreg's dealerships.

data.title: ServiceTitan (Nasdaq: TTAN) acquiring Conduit Tech, HVAC design and sales platform, to integrate AI automation for contractors.
data.description: ServiceTitan, publicly listed as TTAN on Nasdaq, recently disclosed its acquisition deal with Conduit Tech, a cutting-edge HVAC design and sales platform utilizing LiDAR tech. This strategic move aims to enhance ServiceTitan's capabilities by incorporating Conduit's technology for permit-ready load calculations and improving customer engagement. By integrating Conduit's sales tools, ServiceTitan will provide contractors with AI automation products, precise measurement tools, and personalized visualizations to ensure technical accuracy and elevate the overall customer experience. This acquisition marks a significant step for ServiceTitan towards empowering contractors with advanced solutions, promising efficiency and reliability.

data.title: Algoma Steel boosts asset-based credit facility from US$300M to US$375M for hot and cold rolled steel products.
data.description: Algoma Steel Group Inc., a prominent Canadian manufacturer of steel products, recently disclosed a modification to its Amended and Restated Credit Agreement. The company has decided to boost the total commitments within its asset-based revolving credit facility, known as the ABL Facility, from US$300 million to US$375 million. This alteration indicates an increase of US$75 million in the available funds for Algoma Steel Group Inc. The announcement was made on September 18, 2025, at the company's headquarters located in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario.

data.title: NF-κB Inhibitors market in the 7MM set for rapid expansion till 2034 due to rising prevalence of diseases.
data.description: The market for NF-κB inhibitors is expected to experience significant growth due to the rising cases of cancer, autoimmune disorders, and inflammatory conditions associated with NF-κB activation. This market expansion is fueled by the anticipated introduction of new NF-κB inhibitors like BioVie's bezisterim (NE3107) and Entero Therapeutics' products. These developments underscore the market's potential, with the increasing demand for treatments targeting NF-κB signaling pathways in diseases.

data.title: Polymarket odds for CZ's presidential pardon increase with X profile change. Zhao steps down in 2023 as part of a deal with US officials after which he stated no intention to return as Binance CEO.
data.description: Following his resignation in 2023 as a result of a agreement with US authorities that subsequently led to his imprisonment, Changpeng Zhao stated that he had no intentions of resuming his role as CEO at Binance.

data.title: Six attorneys from Hamilton Wingo in Dallas recognized on Texas Super Lawyers, Texas Rising Stars lists for 2025.
data.description: In recent news from Dallas on September 18, 2025, the prestigious Texas Super Lawyers and Texas Rising Stars lists have been released. The Dallas-based plaintiffs law firm Hamilton Wingo is celebrating as six of their skilled attorneys have been acknowledged for their exceptional expertise in handling the cases they are known for. This recognition highlights their dedication and proficiency in serving their clients, solidifying their reputation in the legal field.

data.title: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) to hold Q3 earnings call on Oct 21, 2025, 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET). Press release to be posted on halliburton.com.
data.description: Houston-based company Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) is set to hold a conference call on Tuesday, October 21, 2025. The call, scheduled to commence at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET), will be focused on discussing the company's financial performance for the third quarter of 2025. Prior to the conference call, Halliburton will release a press statement detailing their earnings for the mentioned quarter. Interested individuals can access this press release on the company's website at www.halliburton.com. Those keen on tuning into the conference call can do so through a live webcast available on the Halliburton website.

data.title: RiverMeadow launches in AWS Asia Pacific (New Zealand) Region expanding global reach. Key milestone for workload mobility leader.
data.description: Exciting news comes from RiverMeadow Software Inc. today as they reveal the launch of their Workload Mobility Platform in the AWS Asia Pacific (New Zealand) Region on September 15, 2025. The platform is a breakthrough in workload mobility automation, solidifying RiverMeadow Software Inc.'s leadership in this field. This move signifies a significant step for the company, highlighting its commitment to expansion and innovation.

data.title: Canada seizes $56M in Bitcoin, XRP, and other cryptocurrencies as it shuts down TradeOgre for non-compliance with regulations.
data.description: Authorities from the Royal Canadian Mounted Police have revealed that a certain exchange has neglected to adhere to money laundering regulations. Additionally, they have seized Ethereum, Litecoin, and various other digital assets as part of the investigation.

data.title: Bay FC and San Francisco begin building sports performance center on Treasure Island, 1st women's facility with 3 fields, opening before 2027 season.
data.description: A new sports training facility specifically for women will be launched in San Francisco, boasting three core training fields. Set to open prior to Bay FC's 2027 season, the project has gained support from prominent figures such as San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie and Supervisor Matt Dorsey.

data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich named top US rhinoplasty surgeon by Newsweek for 5th year in a row.
data.description: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, a renowned plastic surgeon and expert in rhinoplasty based in Dallas, has been recognized as the leading rhinoplasty specialist in the United States for the fifth consecutive year. His exceptional skills and expertise have earned him the top spot in Newsweek's prestigious list of America's Best Plastic Surgeons. This acknowledgment comes in the year 2025, solidifying Dr. Rohrich's reputation in the industry.
